norwegian: Oslo er ___ enn Bergen.
english: Oslo is bigger than Bergen.

norwegian: Søsteren min er ___ enn meg.
english: My sister is younger than me.

norwegian: Det er ___ å ta toget enn å kjøre.
english: It is better to take the train than to drive.

norwegian: Denne veien er ___ enn den andre.
english: This road is longer than the other one.

norwegian: Katten er mindre enn hunden.
english: The cat is smaller than the dog.

norwegian: Det er mer interessant å lese enn å se på TV.
english: It is more interesting to read than to watch TV.

norwegian: Været i dag er verre enn i går.
english: The weather today is worse than yesterday.

norwegian: Det er flere studenter på dette kurset enn på det forrige.
english: There are more students on this course than on the previous one.

norwegian: Dårlig vær er verre enn bra vær
english: Bad weather is worse than good weather

norwegian: Jeg er kortere enn min bror
english: I am shorter than my brother

norwegian: Huset mitt er større enn vennens hus
english: My house is bigger than my friend's house

norwegian: Bilen min er lengre enn naboens bil
english: My car is longer than my neighbor's car

norwegian: Vinteren er kaldere enn sommeren
english: Winter is colder than summer

norwegian: Den store byen er større enn den lille
english: The big city is bigger than the small

norwegian: Huset er større enn leiligheten.
english: The house is bigger than the apartment

norwegian: Dette kjøttet er mer mørt enn det andre.
english: This meat is softer than the other

norwegian: Jeg løper raskere enn deg.
english: I run faster than you

norwegian: Været i dag er bedre enn i går.
english: The weather today is better than yesterday

norwegian: Jeg føler meg mer trøtt enn i går.
english: I feel more tired than yesterday

norwegian: Hunden er mer lojal enn katten.
english: The dog is more loyal than the cat

norwegian: Dagens mat var bedre enn i går.
english: Today's food was better than yesterday's

norwegian: Bilen er lengre enn sykkelen.
english: The car is longer than the bike

norwegian: Han er mer trøtt enn jeg.
english: He is more tired than me

norwegian: Kvelden var varmere enn dagen.
english: The evening was warmer than the day

norwegian: Boka er mer interessant enn filmen.
english: The book is more interesting than the movie

norwegian: Det nye huset er større enn det gamle.
english: The new house is bigger than the old one

norwegian: Dette året er verre enn forrige år.
english: This year is worse than last year

norwegian: Kaffen er bedre i dag enn i går.
english: The coffee is better today than yesterday.

norwegian: Jeg har et større hus
english: I have a bigger house

norwegian: Huset mitt er mer komfortabelt
english: My house is more comfortable

norwegian: Jeg liker musikken bedre
english: I like music more

norwegian: Denne jakken er finere enn den andre.
english: This jacket is nicer than the other one.

norwegian: Bussen er billigere enn taxien.
english: The bus is cheaper than the taxi.

norwegian: Broren min er eldre enn meg.
english: My brother is older than me.

norwegian: Det nye biblioteket er høyere enn rådhuset.
english: The new library is taller than the town hall.

norwegian: Denne restauranten er mer populær enn den forrige.
english: This restaurant is more popular than the previous one.

norwegian: Jeg er mer nervøs før eksamen enn du er.
english: I am more nervous before the exam than you are.

norwegian: Telefonen er nyere enn datamaskinen.
english: The phone is newer than the computer.

norwegian: Rommet er ___ enn jeg trodde.
english: The room is nicer than I thought.

norwegian: Det er ___ å gå enn å sitte hele dagen.
english: It is more exciting to walk than to sit all day.
